summary: Applied ADR 0246 from the latest origin/main candidate by teaching the shared runtime-assurance paths to classify startup, ready, degraded, and failed states consistently, then replaying Windmill and API Gateway on docker-runtime-lv3 and re-verifying the new runtime-state surfaces through the observation loop and authenticated platform-health API.

verification.check: Focused repository test slice after rebase
verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml python -m pytest -q tests/test_post_verify_tasks.py tests/test_platform_observation_tool.py tests/test_world_state_workers.py tests/test_health_composite.py tests/test_scaffold_service.py tests/unit/test_graph_client.py` returned `36 passed in 2.25s`, and `./scripts/validate_repo.sh data-models health-probes agent-standards yaml json ansible-syntax workstream-surfaces` completed successfully from rebased branch head `dc0624974fff094ff0f50a096ea5c411d64d53bf`.

After fixing the repo-managed schedule enabled sync task to stop inferring success from wrapper stdout, the scoped replay starting at `Generate the Windmill superadmin secret` completed successfully on `docker-runtime-lv3` with final recap `ok=106 changed=21 failed=0 skipped=23`; `Converge repo-managed Windmill schedule enabled flags`, `Run the Windmill seeded healthcheck script`, and `Assert the Windmill seeded healthcheck result` all passed.

`make converge-api-gateway` completed successfully from the same rebased worktree with final recap `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=236 changed=106 failed=0 skipped=40`; the replay verified the authenticated platform service-catalog endpoint, the anonymous `/v1/health` rejection contract, and the shared startup, liveness, and readiness post-verify path.

`uv run --with pyyaml python scripts/platform_observation_tool.py --checks check-service-health --output-dir .local/platform-observation/ws-0246-verify --digest-path .local/platform-observation/ws-0246-verify/digest.md` recorded `runtime_state=ready` with structured `phase_results` for `api_gateway`, `platform_context_api`, and `windmill`. The same finding reported overall counts `ready=20`, `startup=10`, `failed=11`, and `degraded=0`, confirming the new semantics are live even though unrelated services outside ADR 0246 remain in pre-existing failed or startup states.

Authenticated queries to `https://api.example.com/v1/platform/health/{api_gateway,platform_context_api,windmill}` each returned `status=healthy`, `composite_status=healthy`, `safe_to_act=true`, and a `health_probe` signal with `value=ready`; `https://api.example.com/healthz` returned `{ "status": "ok" }`.

verification.check: Latest host and guest state snapshot
verification.observed: `ops@100.64.0.1` reported hostname `debian-base-template`, kernel `6.17.13-2-pve`, and `pve-manager/9.1.6/71482d1833ded40a`. On `docker-runtime-lv3`, direct container inspection and `docker ps` confirmed `api-gateway` running after the replay, `platform-context-api` running, and the Windmill server plus workers present.

notes: The first full Windmill replay exposed a false negative in `Converge repo-managed Windmill schedule enabled flags`: the SQL updates succeeded against the live database, but the task tried to derive change from wrapper stdout under `no_log`. The live-applied fix made that step explicitly non-changing while preserving the database update behavior.

An earlier full rerun was manually interrupted after the former blocker while copying the Windmill app sync root. The successful verification replay therefore resumed from `Generate the Windmill superadmin secret` so the required bootstrap facts and login token were recomputed before downstream sync tasks.

The worktree was rebased onto `origin/main` after ADR 0250 landed. Those incoming monitoring-only changes were already live-applied on platform version `0.130.44`, so ADR 0246 verification did not need another monitoring replay.

Protected integration files still remain for the main merge step: `VERSION`, `changelog.md`, `RELEASE.md`, versioned release notes, `README.md`, `versions/stack.yaml`, and `build/platform-manifest.json`.
